name: list
context: List and filter pull requests via GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls or gh pr list
info: List, search, and filter pull requests by state, head/base branch, labels, assignees, and sort order. Use the GitHub REST API `GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls` via @octokit/rest, the search API for cross-repo queries, or the `gh pr list` CLI command. Results are paginated — see [[github/pagination]] for traversal patterns. Useful for building dashboards, checking PR status before merges, and triaging open PRs. See [[github/auth]] for authentication and [[github/rate-limits]] for quota management.

sections.title: Basic listing
sections.body: Use `octokit.pulls.list()` or `gh pr list` with `state` (open/closed/all), `sort`, and `direction`. Default is open PRs sorted by creation date descending. Results are paginated — use `per_page: 100` and follow Link headers or `octokit.paginate()`. See [[github/pagination]].

sections.title: Search API for cross-repo queries
sections.body: Use `octokit.search.issuesAndPullRequests()` with `is:pr` qualifier for cross-repo searches. Supports GitHub query syntax: `label:bug`, `author:user`, `review:approved`, `draft:false`, `merged:>2026-01-01`. Search has a separate rate limit of 30 requests/minute. See [[github/rate-limits]].

sections.title: Structured output with gh CLI
sections.body: Use `gh pr list --json <fields>` to get structured JSON output. Available fields include `number`, `title`, `state`, `author`, `createdAt`, `labels`, `reviewDecision`, `headRefName`, `baseRefName`. Pipe through `--jq` for client-side filtering and formatting.

links.context: Parent skill for pull request management
Search endpoint has separate rate limits

related.note: This is a sub-skill of the pulls skill
